title: Slabee
description: New Slabs, Vertical Slabs, and Mixable Slabs!
body:
# Slabee
Slabee is a mod that adds some new features to slabs.

## Features
Slabee is lightweight yet packed with features that you will love!

### New Slab Types
Dirt slabs, Wool slabs, Glass slabs, and more - many blocks now have their own slabs!

![New Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72fc2fc1c44a1392d2100d772d157189c20c7d1e.png)

### Vertical Slabs
Adds "vertical slabs" to Minecraft!

![Vertical Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14fb5ab977e9a149b1a4c17c7c4a3ab2cc762519.png)

### Mixable Slabs
You can mix different types of slabs in a single block!

![Mixable Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67d9b6f9b3b150c97f3e01d525850b939ee894f7.png)

### New Recipes
You can craft slabs back into their original full blocks!
Of course, you can also craft vertical slabs.

![From Slab to Full Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f396e167388b08a73b14be9444b0d3c63b7c7d7.png)

![From Vertical Slab to Full Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b110a0eeb6069711f6edd401ae9a72151e24f30.png)

![Vertical Slab Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d3e1bfd8fe2e369056d91de26edf50bb0cd4b228.png)

### Individual Break (since v1.0.0-beta.2)
Breaking a DoubleSlab while sneaking lets you break just one of its slabs.

![Individually Break](https://yuru-yurufu.github.io/webm/IndividuallyBreak.webp)

### Seamless Connected Glass Slabs (since v1.0.0-beta.3)
Glass slab textures now connect seamlessly, with hidden faces culled!

![Connected Glass Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe7b76baae5891b0c95e86c3c3a2c1a2b2ac9726.png)

## Notice
This mod is still in beta version, so some features are not yet implemented. But don't worry, these won't affect your gameplay. 

Slabee is just getting started, and there's so much more to come. I'd love for you to try it out and share your feedback!

Exciting updates are on the way, so stay tuned!

## Supported Languages
- English
- Japanese
- Chinese (Simplified) (since v1.0.0-beta.3)
